title: vLLM Studio — Security, Standards & State
purpose: Companion audit wiki to droid-wiki, assessing security posture, engineering standards, and project state.
methodology: Five read-only analysis passes over the working tree (controller security, frontend + agent-runtime security, desktop/CLI/supply-chain security, standards-and-process, state-and-metrics), cross-checked against source and the existing droid-wiki. All claims cite file:line.
scope: Code-level review of the working tree only; does not observe the live production deployment's environment configuration.
